source: Deterministic Gamma-log GLMM fixture cross-checked against MixedModels.jl 5.3.0 and lme4 2.0-1 on 2026-04-29

engines.note: Matches the Rust profiled objective and fixed effects at fixture tolerance; MixedModels.jl warns that dispersion-family GLMM results are not yet reliable.
glmer profiles Gamma dispersion differently and is recorded as a comparison point, not as the sole oracle for this fixture.
R package glmmTMB was not installed in the local validation environment.

notes: This compact fixture intentionally uses deterministic positive responses so Rust, R, and Julia can rebuild the same data without relying on language-specific Gamma RNG streams.
glmer is preserved as a drift sentinel because its Gamma dispersion profiling can disagree with the MixedModels.jl-style PIRLS objective; it must not be promoted to the only oracle for this path.
